title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, this is incredible! I never thought you'd get
this many!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I guess still waters really do run deep—or however
it's said. So basically, if I move the handle more
like...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry about it. Just talking to myself.
You did great, really.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely not thinking about stealing your
technique or anything. ♪
